opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My legs have come up with big water blisters today and the nurses here are worried it's a serious infection.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: They appeared quickly today and staff wanted a doctor to check whether I need antibiotics or hospital.

symptom_narrative.character: tense clear water blisters, skin feels a bit tight
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a little itch, no fever, no spreading redness or heat

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: getting on in years, uses a walker

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: regular tablets, no new ones started recently

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives in aged care with nursing staff available

objective_data_offered.value: a few tense clear fluid-filled blisters on both lower legs with mild pink skin around them; no obvious spreading redness or pus, staff report she has no fever
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: described by facility staff over video; warmth, induration and Nikolsky sign cannot be assessed remotely
